title: Qilby Core
description: Core mod for the Qilby Industries pack
body:
This is a core mod for the Qilby Industries pack. It contains additional mutlblocks and machines for Gregtech Modern, cross-mod compat with the rest of the mods in the pack, as well as several game balance tweaks

## Botania Automation
The Automated pure daisy allows to automate processes from Botania’s pure daisy without having to deal with block breaking and placing

![Automated Pure daisy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04a3f1e3c613c35860aede6370a467e4ea07cbe8_0.webp)

The Automated Terrestrial Aggregation Plate allows the easy automation of terrasteel production

![Automated Terrestrial Aggregation Plate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/652e046d6e9c64800d5ceaa21eb4c9495d6aaf88.png)

Both of these machines use Mana Hatches that allow Gregtech Mutiblocks to make use of Botania Mana in processes in a similar fashion to Functional Flora.

![The 15 tiers of Mana Hatches, from ULV to Max Voltage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1dcf19e0d228c9eabce8c362d91bd5c1ffaac0f6.png)

The Runic assembler and Botanic Infuser allow the automation of runic altar and mana pool recipes respectively. The Runic assembler also allows the creation of most of the Gregtech\<\>Botania integration parts.

![Left: MV Runic Assembler. Right: MV Botanic Infuser](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02cdbdc983a9af7d5214dd29607e23ea6065330f.png)

## Steam Engines
![LV Steam Engine Multiblock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b58dc4d74b07095e3598d2c6a14d10c32cac4d51.png)

Steam engines are an early game option for larger scale steam power, they have 4 tiers: LV, MV, HV and EV, after which you are expected to use large Steam turbines from Gregtech.

## Materials

Several new materials are added for use in the various new processes.

![All the new ingots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7b18388d6d9ada554ed67045c6281297d1884f9.png)

## Computation
_**NOTE:** this part of the mod is planned to undergo a near-complete overhaul once Gregtech CEu Modern releases it’s new UI system._

New parts for Gregtech’s High-Performance Computation Array are added to match the accentuated scaling in computation usage.

![New HPCA Parts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54a3afed941120e13b8a7d766010dbe715c6fcac.png)

## Late Game
_**NOTE:** this part of the mod is under active developements and is unfinished_

The Materials Transmutator is a gigantic multiblock allowing the transmutation of low-tier crafting components into higher tier-ones.

![Materials Transmutator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/726f94810b73a668c3182a149e3413a711b0fc32_0.webp)
